# SnuggleStream

> Watch videos together with friends, perfectly synchronized.

SnuggleStream is a free, browser-based platform that lets friends watch video content together in real time. It synchronizes playback so everyone in a room sees the same moment at the same time.

## What It Does

- **Synchronized Video Playback**: Everyone in a room sees the same video at the same time. Play, pause, and seek are synced across all viewers.
- **Room-Based Watch Parties**: Create a room, get a 6-character code, share it with friends. No downloads required.
- **Multiple Video Sources**: Supports direct video URLs (MP4, WebM, MKV, M3U8), YouTube links, and file uploads up to 15 GB.
- **HLS Adaptive Streaming**: Uploaded videos are automatically transcoded into multi-quality HLS streams (360p, 480p, 720p) for smooth playback.
- **Real-Time Chat**: Built-in chat with GIF support (powered by GIPHY) so you can react and discuss while watching.
- **Host Controls**: The room creator controls playback. If the host leaves, viewers vote for a new host.
- **Private Rooms**: Toggle rooms to private so they're only joinable via the room code.

## How It Works

1. Sign in with Google (we only store your name and profile picture)
2. Create a room and set a video source (URL, upload, or set later)
3. Share the 6-character room code with friends
4. Watch together — playback is synchronized across all connected viewers

## Technical Details

- Built with FastAPI (Python) and vanilla JavaScript
- WebSocket-based real-time sync and chat
- HLS transcoding via FFmpeg for uploaded files
- Google OAuth 2.0 for authentication
- No persistent storage — rooms are in-memory and disappear when empty

## Pages

- `/` — Home page: create or join watch party rooms
- `/terms` — Privacy policy and terms of service
- `/room/{code}` — Watch party room (requires sign-in)

## Links

- Home: /
- Privacy Policy: /terms
